ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gimbals" (
  "gimbal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gimbal model */,
  "gimbal_model" TEXT /* Model number of the gimbal */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the gimbal */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the gimbal */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the gimbal in kilograms */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the gimbal in millimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gimbal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cameras" (
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera model */,
  "camera_model" TEXT /* Model number of the camera */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the camera */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the camera */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of camera sensor */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the camera */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the camera in kilograms */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the camera in millimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("camera_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cables" (
  "cable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cable type */,
  "cable_type" TEXT /* Type of cable (e.g., Multi, Type-C) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the cable in meters */,
  "adapter_required" INTEGER /* Whether an adapter is required for the cable */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the cable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compatibility" (
  "compatibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compatibility entry */,
  "gimbal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gimbal model */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera model */,
  "cable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cable type required for the combination */,
  "control_features" TEXT /* Control features supported by the gimbal-camera combination */,
  "is_recommended" INTEGER /* Whether the gimbal-camera combination is recommended */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the gimbal-camera combination based on user reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compatibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compatibility_gimbal_id FOREIGN KEY ("gimbal_id") REFERENCES gimbals ("gimbal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compatibility_cable_id FOREIGN KEY ("cable_id") REFERENCES cables ("cable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compatibility_camera_id FOREIGN KEY ("camera_id") REFERENCES cameras ("camera_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_features" (
  "control_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control feature */,
  "control_feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the control feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the control feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "camera_settings" (
  "camera_setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera setting */,
  "compatibility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compatibility entry */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the camera setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the camera setting */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of camera setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("camera_setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_camera_settings_compatibility_id FOREIGN KEY ("compatibility_id") REFERENCES compatibility ("compatibility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compatibility_notes" (
  "compatibility_note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compatibility note */,
  "compatibility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compatibility entry */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note about the compatibility of the gimbal-camera combination */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of compatibility note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compatibility_note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compatibility_notes_compatibility_id FOREIGN KEY ("compatibility_id") REFERENCES compatibility ("compatibility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "camera_brands" (
  "camera_brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera brand */,
  "camera_brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the camera brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the camera brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("camera_brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gimbal_models" (
  "gimbal_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gimbal model */,
  "gimbal_model_name" TEXT /* Name of the gimbal model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gimbal model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gimbal_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "camera_models" (
  "camera_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera model */,
  "camera_model_name" TEXT /* Name of the camera model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the camera model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("camera_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cable_types" (
  "cable_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cable type */,
  "cable_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cable type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cable type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cable_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firmware_versions" (
  "firmware_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firmware version */,
  "gimbal_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gimbal model */,
  "camera_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera model */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the firmware version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firmware_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firmware_versions_gimbal_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("gimbal_model_id") REFERENCES gimbal_models ("gimbal_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firmware_versions_camera_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("camera_model_id") REFERENCES camera_models ("camera_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_manuals" (
  "user_manual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user manual */,
  "gimbal_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gimbal model */,
  "camera_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera model */,
  "user_manual" TEXT /* User manual */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the user manual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_manual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_manuals_gimbal_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("gimbal_model_id") REFERENCES gimbal_models ("gimbal_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_manuals_camera_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("camera_model_id") REFERENCES camera_models ("camera_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "troubleshooting_guides" (
  "troubleshooting_guide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each troubleshooting guide */,
  "gimbal_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gimbal model */,
  "camera_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera model */,
  "troubleshooting_guide" TEXT /* Troubleshooting guide */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the troubleshooting guide */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("troubleshooting_guide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_troubleshooting_guides_gimbal_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("gimbal_model_id") REFERENCES gimbal_models ("gimbal_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_troubleshooting_guides_camera_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("camera_model_id") REFERENCES camera_models ("camera_model_id")
)
